message:
🐛 Remove redundant demo install banner (#292)

The "Demo Mode Active" banner already has a "Want your own local
KubeStellar Console?" CTA button. The DemoInstallBanner below it
("Want to use your own clusters?") was redundant, stacking two
banners with the same purpose.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
